about.title: XR Services
about.p1: XR Services was founded in 2000 and has since become one of the most trusted accounting and tax consulting firms in Greece, serving hundreds of businesses across all sectors.
about.p2: With an experienced team of specialized professionals, we provide high-quality accounting, tax and consulting services tailored to the needs of every business.

experience.title: Experience & Expertise
experience.desc: We have been mastering our field for over 25 years, providing high-quality services to our clients.

consistency.title: Consistency & Effectiveness
consistency.desc: Our commitment is consistency and effectiveness so our clients achieve a better and more profitable future.

transparency.title: Transparency & Accountability
transparency.desc: Our philosophy is built on transparency and accountability — the core pillars of our client service.

quality.title: Quality Standards
quality.desc: We deliver high-quality certified services ensuring complete client satisfaction.

hero.title: Accounting & Tax Services
hero.subtitle: We handle the accounting and tax management of your business with precision, transparency and modern methods.

quote.text: The success of every business starts with the right decisions. We are here to give you the tools you need.
quote.author: XR Services — Trusted Advisors

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive solutions for every business need

accounting.title: Accounting Services
accounting.desc: Full bookkeeping, monthly profit & loss statements and balance sheets.

tax.title: Tax Services
tax.desc: Tax planning, VAT returns, and tax authority representation.

consulting.title: Consulting Services
consulting.desc: Strategic development, business planning and financial analysis.

payroll.title: Payroll
payroll.desc: Complete payroll management, social security and labor law compliance.

audit.title: Tax Audits
audit.desc: Support in tax audits and representation before authorities.

monitoring.title: Financial Monitoring
monitoring.desc: Regular monitoring of financial data and management reports.

startup.title: Business Startup
startup.desc: Company formation, legal structure selection, registration and licensing.

corporate.title: Corporate Support
corporate.desc: Legal changes, mergers, corporate transformations and liquidations.

specialSolutions.title: Special Solutions
specialSolutions.subtitle: Specialized services tailored to your industry

hotels.title: Hotels
hotels.desc: Accounting management for hotel units, tourism VAT and compliance.

manufacturing.title: Manufacturing / Industry
manufacturing.desc: Production costing, inventory and supply chain management.

education.title: Educational Institutions
education.desc: Accounting for educational institutions, donations and grants.

construction.title: Construction / Technical
construction.desc: Technical projects, counterpart agreements, construction VAT and permits.

food.title: Food & Beverage
food.desc: Restaurants, cafes, catering — full F&B accounting and compliance.

commerce.title: Commercial Businesses
commerce.desc: Retail & wholesale trade, inventory management and B2B solutions.

articles.title: News
articles.subtitle: Stay informed about the latest developments in taxation and accounting

article1.title: Income Tax Changes 2026
article1.excerpt: The new regulations for the 2026 tax year significantly affect businesses. Discover what is changing and how to prepare.

article2.title: myDATA: Everything You Need to Know
article2.excerpt: Complete guide to electronic data transmission to the tax authority. Obligations, deadlines and practical advice.

article3.title: Digital Transformation in Accounting
article3.excerpt: How modern technologies are changing the way accountants work and why you should embrace the change.
